title: Sort order - multiple boards in a Timeline
excerpt: I’m using the Timeline widget in a Dashboard that’s consolidating information from > 10 individual boards. I’m grouping by board. I’d like to be able to manually set the sort order. Currently Monday sets the sort order a…

posts.author: williamn (william noto)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m using the Timeline widget in a Dashboard that’s consolidating information from > 10 individual boards. I’m grouping by board. I’d like to be able to manually set the sort order. Currently Monday sets the sort order and I would like to adjust it myself.
